title: Truncate Context to Token Budget
description: Keep the most relevant content within a token budget.
problem: Write truncate_to_budget(chunks, max_tokens, tokens_per_chunk) that takes a list of text chunks and returns as many as fit within max_tokens budget, keeping the highest-scoring ones first. Each chunk has a score field.
